flashcards.question: What is the wingspan of the Boeing 737-800?
What is the tail height of the Boeing 737-800?
What is the length of the Boeing 737-800?
What structure type is used for the 737 fuselage?
What composite materials are used in the 737 structure?
Which part of the aircraft usually determines obstacle clearance during a turn?
How much pavement width is roughly required for a 180° turn with a Boeing 737-900?
What is the maximum nose wheel steering angle on the Boeing 737?
What minimum wingtip clearance should be maintained from obstacles before starting a turn?
What type of doors are the main entry doors on the 737?
Why cannot plug-type doors be opened when the aircraft is pressurized?
flashcards.answer: Cabin pressure forces the door into the frame.

flashcards.question: What is the maximum wind limit for operating entry or service doors?
At what wind gust limit should open doors be closed immediately?
What condition will engage the over-wing exit flight locks?
flashcards.answer: When three entry doors are closed, at least one engine is running, and thrust levers are advanced.

flashcards.question: Where is the flight crew oxygen cylinder located?
flashcards.answer: In the E&E (Electronics and Equipment) compartment.

flashcards.question: What is the maximum pressure of the flight crew oxygen system?
At what cabin altitude do passenger oxygen masks automatically deploy?
How long does passenger chemical oxygen typically last?
How long does Protective Breathing Equipment (PBE) provide oxygen?
What triggers emergency exit lights when the switch is armed?
How long do emergency exit light batteries last?
How long does it take to recharge emergency exit light batteries?
How long do photo-luminescent floor strips glow after charging?
How long must photo-luminescent strips be exposed to light to charge?
What are the possible potable water tank capacities?
What are the lavatory water heater temperature settings?
At what temperature does lavatory water heater overheat protection activate?
What is the usable capacity of the vacuum waste tank?
At what altitude does the vacuum waste system change from blower operation to pressure differential?
